zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor於大約1229年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton55歲，母親Katherine de Elleigh25歲。他於大約1257年與Ms. Ralph De Shelton在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年2月24日在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor于大约1229年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton55岁，母亲Katherine de Elleigh25岁。他于大约1257年与Ms. Ralph De Shelton在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年2月24日在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Shelton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor was born about 1229, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, was 55 and his mother, Katherine de Elleigh, was 25. He married Ms. Ralph De Shelton about 1257, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 24 February 1270, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor est né environ 1229, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Katherine d’Elleigh, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ms. Ralph De Shelton environ 1257, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 24 février 1270, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor um 1229 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton 55 und seine Mutter Katherine de Elleigh 25. Er hat um 1257 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Ms. Ralph De Shelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Februar 1270 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor è nato il circa 1229 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Elleigh, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ms. Ralph De Shelton circa 1257, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 24 febbraio 1270, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manorが約1229年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Sheltonは55歳，母Katherine de Elleighは25歳であった。約1257年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでMs. Ralph De Sheltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年2月24日に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor(이)가 대략 1229년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Elleigh(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Ms. Ralph De Shelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 2월 24일 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor nasceu aproximadamente 1229, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Elleigh, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ms. Ralph De Shelton aproximadamente 1257, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1270, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor родился около 1229 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Elleigh, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ms. Ralph De Shelton около 1257 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 24 февраля 1270 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Shelton, 6th Lord of Shelton Manor nació aproximadamente 1229, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph De Shelton 4th Lord Of Shelton, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Katherine de Elleigh, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ms. Ralph De Shelton aproximadamente 1257, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 24 de febrero de 1270, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
